name: Chile Zucchini Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 pound zucchini, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the zucchini until tender.
2. Spread Cheese Whiz in the bottom of a casserole dish.
3. Warm the cream of chicken soup in a small pan.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (zucchini, onion, eggs, and canned green chilies) to the warm soup.
5. Pour the mixture over the cheese in the casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle buttered bread crumbs over the top.
7. Bake at 350°F until browned, about 30 minutes.
Yield: 8 servings.
